def _is_active_with_amount(item: dict) -> bool:
    return item.get("status") == "active" and item.get("amount", 0) > 0


def _format_record(record: dict) -> str:
    return f"{record['name']} ({record['id']})"


def _is_high_priority(item: dict) -> bool:
    return item["priority"] > 3 and item["active"]


def process_items(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return [item for item in items if _is_active_with_amount(item)]


def transform_records(records: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    return [_format_record(r) for r in records]


def filter_and_sort(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return [item for item in items if _is_high_priority(item)]
